subject: Cannot log in - MFA loop
body: Hi, every time I enter my code from the authenticator app it sends me back to the login page. I tried 3 different codes. Chrome on macOS.

subject: Where is my refund?
body: I cancelled my Pro plan on April 28 but I see the charge of $79 still on my card. Please refund.

subject: Slack integration not posting
body: Followed the docs at /integrations/slack but my channel never receives the test message. The webhook URL starts with hooks.slack.com/services/T0AAA...

subject: Bug: report export hangs at 50%
body: Click Export PDF in the reports section. Progress bar climbs to 50% then nothing for 5+ minutes. Tried with both Chrome and Firefox. My account has 1200 rows in this report.

subject: Suspicious login from another country
body: I got an email saying someone logged in from Brazil. I was asleep. Please lock my account NOW.
